overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through a western ranch setting. The player approaches an NPC rider, performs a rear maneuver, and explores the ranch passing cattle corrals with oxen, wooden barns, and a windmill under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with scattered oak trees approaching ranch buildings

events.description: horse rears up on hind legs and makes a sharp pivot turn

agents.ego_description: riding forward through tall grass approaching the ranch, then rearing the horse near an NPC

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the dirt path toward the player character

entered.detail: mature oak tree with dense green canopy casting shadows on the grass
weathered wooden split-rail fence lining the property boundary
worn dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the grassland
cluster of wooden ranch structures with sloped roofs in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie with golden grass under a clear afternoon sky. The camera follows a horse rider approaching a large oak tree and wooden fence line. An NPC rider appears in the distance approaching from the ranch buildings. At approximately 11 seconds, the player's horse rears up dramatically before the scene transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: ranch center with wooden outbuildings and fenced corrals

events.description: moving from open prairie into the main ranch compound with buildings

agents.ego_description: riding past the NPC and through the ranch center toward the cattle corrals

notable_agents.action: riding past the player on the right side heading toward the open range

entered.detail: two-story wooden ranch house with covered porch and weathered planks
small single-story wooden outbuilding with slanted roof
wooden post fence enclosing the livestock area with horizontal rails
round hay bales wrapped in twine stacked near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The rider enters the main ranch compound, passing wooden ranch houses and sheds. The NPC rider passes by on the right. The camera moves toward the cattle corral area, with hay bales becoming visible near the fence lines. The large oak tree from the opening recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cattle corral with fenced enclosures and grazing livestock

events.description: entering the cattle corral area with visible oxen and livestock

agents.ego_description: riding slowly along the fence line observing the cattle in the corral

notable_agents.action: white oxen grazing on grass inside the fenced corral
brown ox standing near the hay bales by the fence

entered.detail: long wooden barn structure with dark roof and open lower level
wooden feeding trough attached to the fence rails

segments.scene_description: The rider explores the cattle corral area, moving along the wooden fence line. White and brown oxen graze peacefully within the enclosure. The camera passes close to the hay bales and feeding troughs, with the large wooden barn visible in the background. The ranch buildings from the previous segment fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ranch land with windmill and distant forested hills

events.description: leaving the cattle corral and entering the open range with windmill

agents.ego_description: riding past the corral toward the windmill and distant forested hills

entered.detail: tall metal windmill with spinning blades for water pumping
tree-covered rolling hills forming the backdrop of the ranch

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the rider leaving the cattle area behind and entering open range land. A prominent windmill stands on the left against the backdrop of forested hills. The camera moves past additional ranch outbuildings and wooden fencing, concluding the tour of the rural property.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, golden prairie into the heart of a working ranch before emerging onto the open range. It begins with a rider approaching a large oak tree and fence line under a clear afternoon sky, where the horse rears up dramatically as an NPC rider approaches from the distance. As the rider enters the main ranch compound, the scene shifts past wooden houses and sheds toward the cattle corral area, leaving the oak tree behind in the distance. The camera then glides along the wooden fences of the enclosure, passing hay bales and feeding troughs while white and brown oxen graze in front of a large wooden barn. Finally, the view opens up as the rider leaves the cattle area behind, moving past a prominent windmill and additional outbuildings toward forested hills.
